mapper.sql: SELECT e.id, 1 AS task_type, e.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS user_nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.email, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') AS account, e.status, e.scope_json, e.format, e.file_name, e.fail_reason, '' AS verify_type, '' AS reason, e.expire_at, NULL AS cooling_off_expire_at, NULL AS completed_at, NULL AS cancelled_at, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM privacy_export_task e LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = e.user_id UNION ALL SELECT d.id, 2 AS task_type, d.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS user_nickname, COALESCE(d.account_snapshot, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.email, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '')) AS account, d.status, '' AS scope_json, '' AS format, '' AS file_name, '' AS fail_reason, d.verify_type, d.reason, NULL AS expire_at, d.cooling_off_expire_at, d.completed_at, d.cancelled_at, d.created_at, d.updated_at FROM privacy_delete_task d LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = d.user_id
